name: Shandong Sunpaper Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sunpaper Co., Ltd. produces and sells paper products in China. It offers coated papers, offset papers, and light-weight papers; copy papers, digital coated papers, and digital color laser papers; PE-coated paperboard for food packaging, sheet lining, service plate paper, and base paper for food products; and craft papers, recycled craft papers, fluting medium, white craft papers, coated ivory board, chrome ivory board, and cigarette carton papers. The company also provides industrial papers, including one-sided coated papers, coated paper without fluorescer, release base papers, interleaving papers for PS plate, stainless steel interleaving papers, aluminum foil interleaving papers, and thermal-sensitive base papers; and household paper products, such as coreless roll paper, roll toilet paper, box tissues, packet tissues, handkerchief paper, wet tissues, and baby diapers. In addition, it offers natural cellulose and craft board paper; and operates Shandong Sun Plaza International Hotel. Shandong Sunpaper Co., Ltd. offers its products under the Golden Sun, Huaxia Sun, Tian Yang, Weier, Sun Element, and Suyappy brands. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jining, China.
